creator: christian.mauderer@embedded-brains.de
text: OK, I agree that it's an intended behaviour. Maybe it would be a good idea anyway to at least print a warning or use some if-kernel-compiled-with-debug-options-assert so that a driver developer at least gets some feedback that an ivar that is expected to be always valid is missing. The resulting driver bugs can be really nasty to find. A simple error message in the log could help a lot finding them.
